channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-24
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen significant progress across multiple projects. Notably, Lakens' updates to `scienceverse/metacheck` have resolved critical issues and enhanced paper database functionality, which will likely have a positive impact on related projects such as `giladfeldman/docpluck`. The `docpluck` project itself has also seen improvements, with updated documentation and fixes to tables and rendering. Meanwhile, `shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve` and `giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward` have received updates, including a revised validation note with a citation and the addition of a Chrome Webstore link, respectively. These connections and advancements demonstrate the collaborative spirit and dedication of our community, and we look forward to seeing the continued growth and impact of these projects. Overall, it's an exciting time for our community, with many opportunities for synergy and innovation on the horizon.

90 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: output-it-forward

Most active:

coarse30 commits
regcheck30 commits
docpluck19 commits
metacheck7 commits
escicheck3 commits

item.title: output-it-forward: activity update
item.description:
giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward

The `main` branch was updated with a commit that added a Chrome Webstore link for OIF, as stated in the commit message "Add Chrome Webstore link for OIF". No other branches were worked on in this set of commits. This specific change added a link to the Chrome Webstore, providing users with direct access to the OIF extension. The commit did not mention any other changes or additions to the repository. The `main` branch now includes this updated link, but no other modifications were made in this set of commits.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
